muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /alone Alone(execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /last/{id} Last(ctx, id, execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /first/{id} First(execute, ctx, id)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /middle/{id} Middle(ctx, execute, id)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
{{- define "POST /form WithForm(form, execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Alone(execute func(int) error) error { return execute(1) }

func (Server) Last(ctx context.Context, id int, execute func(int) error) error {
	_ = ctx
	return execute(id)
}

func (Server) First(execute func(int) error, ctx context.Context, id int) error {
	_ = ctx
	return execute(id)
}

func (Server) Middle(ctx context.Context, execute func(int) error, id int) error {
	_ = ctx
	return execute(id)
}

type FormData struct {
	N int `name:"n"`
}

func (Server) WithForm(form FormData, execute func(int) error) error {
	return execute(form.N)
}
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"net/url"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func get(t *testing.T, mux *http.ServeMux, path, want string) {
	t.Helper()
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, path, nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("%s status = %d, want 200", path, rec.Code)
	}
	if got := rec.Body.String(); !strings.Contains(got, want) {
		t.Fatalf("%s body = %q, want contains %q", path, got, want)
	}
}

func TestArgOrder(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})

	get(t, mux, "/alone", "<p>1</p>")
	get(t, mux, "/last/7", "<p>7</p>")
	get(t, mux, "/first/8", "<p>8</p>")
	get(t, mux, "/middle/9", "<p>9</p>")

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/form", strings.NewReader(url.Values{"n": {"42"}}.Encode()))
	req.Header.Set("content-type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("/form status = %d, want 200", rec.Code)
	}
	if got := rec.Body.String(); !strings.Contains(got, "<p>42</p>") {
		t.Fatalf("/form body = %q, want contains <p>42</p>", got)
	}
}
